name: Fig Breakfast Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow figs to stand in boiling water for 10 minutes. Clip off stems and blossom ends with scissors, and snip into small pieces. Reserve some for use in syrup.
2. Sift the flour, then measure and re-sift it into a mixing bowl with the remaining dry ingredients.
3. Add lemon rind and finely chopped figs to the mixture. In a separate bowl, combine well-beaten egg yolks with milk and melted shortening. Mix this liquid into the dry ingredients.
4. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
5. Cook the batter on a hot waffle iron until golden brown.
6. Serve with plenty of butter and warm maple syrup to which cut figs have been added.
